items.title: Ausom Soccer Season Sale wants you to score with up to $250 exclusive savings on three e-scooters starting from $529
items.summary: Ausom is currently running a Soccer Season sale that is offering up to $200 in initial discounts on three of its electric scooter models – plus, you’ll be able to score an exclusive bonus $50 savings, too, using our code 9to5Toys at checkout. Not only that, but your purchase also scores you free shipping and a 2-year warranty. This promotional event will continue through July 20, 2026, celebrating the World Cup festivities that will be ending July 19, and gives you up to $250 combined savings on either the Gosoul 2, Gosoul 2 Pro Dual Motor, and K20 Pro Dual Motor e-scooters. Head down below to get a closer look at the deals, as well as the scooter’s feature sets.

These two options would cost you $1,914 and $2,114, respectively, were the discounts from this brand not on the bundles themselves. These packages even come as larger bundles over early June’s Xpeak2-focused Father’s Day promotions, giving you a rear cargo rack, an Elite headlight, a suspension seat post, a fender set, and a water-resistant pannier bag. Head below to learn more about this particular model, or you can browse the full lineup of deals from this sale in our original coverage here.

If you missed out on Prime Day last month, which is when we last saw the annual low appear, you’re getting the next-best price for the last 12 months here with $70 savings. There’s also the cheaper option of the smaller 17-inch Camber Fire Pit down at $139.99 shipped from its $210 full price.
